allow: Bash(sqlite3 backend/db/jobs.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_jobs FROM jobs;")
Bash(sqlite3 backend/db/jobs.db "SELECT id, title, budget, status FROM jobs LIMIT 3;")
Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Freelance Job Manager - Complete workflow system *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add semi-auto actions - send proposals, messages, deliverables, payment requests *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: Replace sqlite3 with better-sqlite3 for Railway compatibility *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: Auto-detect API base URL for Railway deployment *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Rewrite dashboard UI - fix action buttons display *)

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); console.log\('GITHUB_TOKEN:', process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN ? '✅ Configured \(' + process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN.substring\(0,4\) + '...' + process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN.slice\(-4\) + '\)' : '❌ Missing'\); console.log\('GITHUB_USERNAME:', process.env.GITHUB_USERNAME || '❌ Missing'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); console.log\('GITHUB_TOKEN:', process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN ? '✅ Configured' : '❌ Missing'\); console.log\('GITHUB_USERNAME:', process.env.GITHUB_USERNAME || '❌ Missing'\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./backend/db/jobs.db'\); const info = db.pragma\('table_info\(jobs\)'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(info.map\(c => c.name\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {all} = require\('./backend/db/database'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const skipped = await all\('SELECT id, title, platform, budget, description FROM jobs WHERE status = \\"SKIPPED\\" ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 10'\); console.log\('Recently Skipped Jobs:'\); skipped.forEach\(j => console.log\('  [' + j.platform + '] $' + \(j.budget||0\) + ' - ' + j.title.substring\(0,80\) + ' | budget_col=' + j.budget\)\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {all} = require\('./backend/db/database'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const freelancer = await all\('SELECT id, title, status, budget, platform FROM jobs WHERE platform = \\"freelancer\\" AND status = \\"SCANNED\\" ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 15'\); console.log\('Freelancer SCANNED jobs \(top budget\):'\); freelancer.forEach\(j => console.log\('  $' + \(j.budget||0\) + ' - ' + j.title.substring\(0,70\)\)\); console.log\(\); const github = await all\('SELECT id, title, status, budget, platform FROM jobs WHERE platform = \\"github\\" AND status = \\"SCANNED\\" ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 15'\); console.log\('GitHub SCANNED jobs \(top budget\):'\); github.forEach\(j => console.log\('  $' + \(j.budget||0\) + ' - ' + j.title.substring\(0,70\)\)\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {all} = require\('./backend/db/database'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const skipped = await all\(\\"SELECT id, title, platform, budget FROM jobs WHERE status = 'SKIPPED' ORDER BY ROWID DESC LIMIT 10\\"\); console.log\('Recently Skipped Jobs:'\); skipped.forEach\(j => console.log\('  [' + j.platform + '] $' + \(j.budget||0\) + ' - ' + j.title.substring\(0,80\)\)\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {all} = require\('./backend/db/database'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const fl = await all\(\\"SELECT id, title, status, budget, platform FROM jobs WHERE platform = 'freelancer' AND status = 'SCANNED' ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 15\\"\); console.log\('Freelancer SCANNED \(top budget\):'\); fl.forEach\(j => console.log\('  $' + \(j.budget||0\) + ' - ' + j.title.substring\(0,70\)\)\); console.log\(\); const gh = await all\(\\"SELECT id, title, status, budget, platform FROM jobs WHERE platform = 'github' AND status = 'SCANNED' ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 15\\"\); console.log\('GitHub SCANNED \(top budget\):'\); gh.forEach\(j => console.log\('  $' + \(j.budget||0\) + ' - ' + j.title.substring\(0,70\)\)\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {all} = require\('./backend/db/database'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const submitted = await all\(\\"SELECT id, title, platform, budget, project_url, solution FROM jobs WHERE status = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY ROWID DESC LIMIT 15\\"\); console.log\('SUBMITTED Jobs \(most recent\):'\); submitted.forEach\(j => { let prUrl = ''; try { const sol = JSON.parse\(j.solution\); prUrl = sol.prUrl || ''; } catch\(e\){} console.log\('  [' + j.platform + '] $' + \(j.budget||0\) + ' PR:' + prUrl + ' - ' + j.title.substring\(0,60\)\); }\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {run} = require\('./backend/db/database'\); \(async\(\)=>{ await run\(\\"UPDATE jobs SET status = 'SCANNED' WHERE id = 'fl-40451392-1779094584528'\\"\); console.log\('Reset fl-40451392-1779094584528 to SCANNED'\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {all} = require\('./backend/db/database'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const stats = await all\(\\"SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) as count FROM jobs GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC\\"\); console.log\('Job Status Distribution:'\); stats.forEach\(s => console.log\('  ' + s.status + ': ' + s.count\)\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")
